# BP-96 negative variant: QueryContext rows are closed
lang: go
file: BP-96-variant-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
)

func load(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB) error {
	rs, err := db.QueryContext(ctx, "select 1")
	if err != nil {
		return fmt.Errorf("query: %w", err)
	}
	if closeErr := rs.Close(); closeErr != nil {
		return fmt.Errorf("close rows: %w", closeErr)
	}
	return nil
}
